blocks.original:
---
name: init
description: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation.
---
blocks.zh:
---
名称：初始化
描述：使用代码库文档初始化一个新的 CLAUDE.md 文件。
---

blocks.original: Set up a minimal CLAUDE.md (and optionally skills and hooks) for this repo. CLAUDE.md is loaded into every Claude Code session, so it must be concise — only include what Claude would get wrong without it.
blocks.zh: 为此存储库设置一个最小的 CLAUDE.md（以及可选的技能和挂钩）。 CLAUDE.md 会加载到每个 Claude 代码会话中，因此它必须简洁 - 仅包含 Claude 如果没有它会出错的内容。

blocks.original: ## Phase 0: Check for an existing CLAUDE.md
blocks.zh: ## 第 0 阶段：检查现有的 CLAUDE.md

blocks.original: Before asking anything, check if CLAUDE.md already exists at the project root (just `cat ./CLAUDE.md` — only the project-root file counts; don't explore the tree yet). This branches Phase 1.
blocks.zh: 在询问任何问题之前，请检查 CLAUDE.md 是否已存在于项目根目录中（只需 `cat ./CLAUDE.md` — 仅项目根目录文件有效；暂时不要探索该树）。这分支到第一阶段。

blocks.original: ## Phase 1: Ask what to set up
blocks.zh: ## 第 1 阶段：询问要设置什么

blocks.original: Use AskUserQuestion to find out what the user wants. Which question you ask depends on Phase 0. Call AskUserQuestion with **only Q1** — do NOT include Q2 in the same call. Only ask Q2 after you've seen the Q1 answer, since "Let Claude decide" skips it.
blocks.zh: 使用 AskUserQuestion 找出用户想要什么。您提出哪个问题取决于阶段 0。使用**仅 Q1** 调用 AskUserQuestion — 不要在同一调用中包含 Q2。仅在看到问题 1 的答案后才询问问题 2，因为“让克劳德决定”会跳过它。

blocks.original: Before the first question, print this primer as normal assistant text so first-time users know the terms:
blocks.zh: 在回答第一个问题之前，请将此入门知识打印为普通的助理文本，以便初次用户了解这些术语：

blocks.original:
> Quick context:
> - **CLAUDE.md** files give Claude persistent instructions for a project, your personal workflow, or your organization. Claude reads them at the start of every session.
> - **Skills** are packaged instructions Claude invokes automatically when a task matches, or that you trigger with a slash command (e.g. `/frontend-design`, `/commit-push-pr`).
> - **Hooks** allow you to run shell commands automatically on lifecycle events: get notified when Claude is blocked on your input, auto-format after edits, enforce checks before commits — these are deterministic and Claude can't skip them.
blocks.zh:
> 快速上下文：
> - **CLAUDE.md** 文件为 Claude 提供有关项目、个人工作流程或组织的持久指示。克劳德在每次课程开始时都会阅读它们。
> - **技能**是克劳德在任务匹配时自动调用的打包指令，或者使用斜杠命令触发的指令（例如“/frontend-design”、“/commit-push-pr”）。
> - **Hooks** 允许您在生命周期事件上自动运行 shell 命令：当 Claude 阻止输入时收到通知、编辑后自动格式化、提交前强制检查 - 这些是确定性的，Claude 无法跳过它们。

blocks.original:
**If CLAUDE.md already exists**, ask:
- "I found an existing CLAUDE.md. What would you like to do?"
  Options: "Review and improve it" | "Leave it, set up other things" | "Start fresh (replace it)"
  Description for improve: "Explore what's changed in the codebase and propose targeted edits to the existing file."
  Description for leave it: "Skip CLAUDE.md. Go straight to skills and hooks."
  Description for start fresh: "Discard it and write new file(s)."
  Routing:
  - "Review and improve" → skip Q1/Q2; explore (Phase 2), ask the single Phase 3-lite question, then go to Phase 4's diff-proposal, then Phase 8.
  - "Leave it" → skip Q1, ask Q2 (rename its fourth option to "Neither — skip setup"). If they pick "Neither — skip setup", jump straight to Phase 8 with: "Nothing to set up — your CLAUDE.md is unchanged." Otherwise: Phase 2 → Phase 3 proposal (no gap-fill interview) → Phases 6/7 per queue → Phase 8. For Phase 7's hook target-file default, treat this path as "project" (`.claude/settings.json`).
  - "Start fresh" → continue to Q1 below as if no file existed.
blocks.zh:
**如果 CLAUDE.md 已经存在**，询问：
- “我找到了现有的 CLAUDE.md。你想做什么？”
  选项：“审查并改进它”| “放下它，设置其他的东西”| “重新开始（替换它）”
  改进描述：“探索代码库中的更改并提出对现有文件的有针对性的编辑。”
  left it 的描述：“跳过 CLAUDE.md。直接看技能和钩子。”
  重新开始的描述：“丢弃它并写入新文件。”
  路由：
  -“回顾并改进”→跳过Q1/Q2；探索（第 2 阶段），提出单个第 3 阶段精简版问题，然后进入第 4 阶段的 diff-proposal，然后进入第 8 阶段。
  - “保留”→ 跳过 Q1，询问 Q2（将其第四个选项重命名为“都不 — 跳过设置”）。如果他们选择“都不 — 跳过设置”，请直接跳到第 8 阶段：“无需设置 — 您的 CLAUDE.md 未更改。”否则：阶段 2 → 阶段 3 提案（无间隙填充访谈）→ 每个队列的阶段 6/7 → 阶段 8。对于阶段 7 的钩子目标文件默认值，将此路径视为“项目”(`.claude/settings.json`)。
  - “重新开始”→ 继续下面的 Q1，就好像不存在文件一样。

blocks.original:
**If no CLAUDE.md exists** (or the user picked "Start fresh"), ask:
- Q1: "Which CLAUDE.md files should /init set up?"
  Options: "Project CLAUDE.md" | "Personal CLAUDE.local.md" | "Both project + personal" | "Let Claude decide"
  Description for project: "Team-shared instructions checked into source control — architecture, coding standards, common workflows."
  Description for personal: "Your private preferences for this project (gitignored, not shared) — your role, sandbox URLs, preferred test data, workflow quirks."
  Description for Let Claude decide: "Fastest path — project CLAUDE.md plus whatever skills or hooks fit this repo. No follow-on questions; you'll approve everything before it's written."
  If the user picks "Let Claude decide", skip Q2 — treat it as project CLAUDE.md with no skills/hooks constraint.
blocks.zh:
**如果 CLAUDE.md 不存在**（或用户选择“重新开始”），则询问：
- Q1：“/init 应该设置哪些 CLAUDE.md 文件？”
  选项：“项目 CLAUDE.md”| “个人 CLAUDE.local.md”| “既项目+个人”| “让克劳德决定”
  项目描述：“检查到源代码控制的团队共享指令——架构、编码标准、通用工作流程。”
  个人描述：“您对此项目的私人偏好（gitignored，不共享）——您的角色、沙箱 URL、首选测试数据、工作流程怪癖。”
  让 Claude 决定的描述：“最快的路径 - 项目 CLAUDE.md 加上适合此存储库的任何技能或挂钩。没有后续问题；您将在编写之前批准所有内容。”
  如果用户选择“让 Claude 决定”，则跳过 Q2 — 将其视为没有技能/钩子限制的项目 CLAUDE.md。

blocks.original:
- Q2: "Also set up skills and hooks?"
  Options: "Skills + hooks" | "Skills only" | "Hooks only" | "Neither, just CLAUDE.md"
  Description for skills: "Packaged instructions Claude invokes automatically when a task matches, or that you trigger with a slash command (e.g. `/frontend-design`, `/commit-push-pr`)."
  Description for hooks: "Deterministic shell commands that run on tool events (e.g., format after every edit). Claude can't skip them."
  Q2 is a hint, not a filter — Phase 3 proposes what fits the codebase and notes any deviation.
blocks.zh:
- Q2：“还设置了技能和挂钩？”
  选项：“技能+挂钩”| “仅技能”| “仅挂钩” | “都不是，只是克劳德.md”
  技能描述：“当任务匹配时，或者用斜线命令触发（例如`/frontend-design`、`/commit-push-pr`）时，克劳德会自动调用打包指令。”
  挂钩描述：“在工具事件上运行的确定性 shell 命令（例如，每次编辑后的格式）。Claude 无法跳过它们。”
  Q2 是一个提示，而不是一个过滤器——第 3 阶段提出了适合代码库的内容并记录任何偏差。

blocks.original: ## Phase 2: Explore the codebase
blocks.zh: ## 第 2 阶段：探索代码库

blocks.original: Launch a subagent to survey the codebase, and ask it to read key files to understand the project: manifest files (package.json, Cargo.toml, pyproject.toml, go.mod, pom.xml, etc.), README, Makefile/build configs, CI config, existing CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules/, AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules or .cursorrules, .github/copilot-instructions.md, .windsurfrules, .clinerules, .mcp.json.
blocks.zh: 启动子代理来调查代码库，并要求它读取关键文件以了解项目：清单文件（package.json、Cargo.toml、pyproject.toml、go.mod、pom.xml 等）、README、Makefile/build 配置、CI 配置、现有 CLAUDE.md、.claude/rules/、AGENTS.md、.cursor/rules 或 .cursorrules， .github/copilot-instructions.md、.windsurfrules、.clinerules、.mcp.json。

blocks.original:
Detect:
- Build, test, and lint commands (especially non-standard ones)
- Languages, frameworks, and package manager
- Project structure (monorepo with workspaces, multi-module, or single project)
- Code style rules that differ from language defaults
- Non-obvious gotchas, required env vars, or workflow quirks
- Existing .claude/skills/ and .claude/rules/ directories
- Formatter configuration (prettier, biome, ruff, black, gofmt, rustfmt, or a unified format script like `npm run format` / `make fmt`)
- Git worktree usage: run `git worktree list` to check if this repo has multiple worktrees (only relevant if the user wants a personal CLAUDE.local.md)
blocks.zh:
检测：
- 构建、测试和 lint 命令（尤其是非标准命令）
- 语言、框架和包管理器
- 项目结构（带有工作区的 monorepo、多模块或单个项目）
- 与语言默认值不同的代码样式规则
- 不明显的陷阱、所需的环境变量或工作流程怪癖
- 现有的 .claude/skills/ 和 .claude/rules/ 目录
- 格式化程序配置（prettier、biome、ruff、black、gofmt、rustfmt 或统一格式脚本，如“npm run format”/“make fmt”）
- Git 工作树用法：运行 `git worktree list` 来检查此存储库是否有多个工作树（仅当用户想要个人 CLAUDE.local.md 时才相关）

blocks.original: Note what you could NOT figure out from code alone — these become interview questions.
blocks.zh: 请注意您无法仅从代码中弄清楚的内容 - 这些将成为面试问题。

blocks.original: ## Phase 3: Fill in the gaps
blocks.zh: ## 第三阶段：填补空白

blocks.original: Use AskUserQuestion to gather what you still need to write good CLAUDE.md files and skills. Ask only things the code can't answer.
blocks.zh: 使用 AskUserQuestion 收集编写优秀 CLAUDE.md 文件所需的知识和技能。只询问代码无法回答的问题。

blocks.original: If the user chose project CLAUDE.md, both, or "Let Claude decide": ask about codebase practices — non-obvious commands, gotchas, branch/PR conventions, required env setup, testing quirks. Skip things already in README or obvious from manifest files. Do not mark any options as "recommended" — this is about how their team works, not best practices.
blocks.zh: 如果用户选择项目 CLAUDE.md，两者都选择，或者“让 Claude 决定”：询问代码库实践 - 非显而易见的命令、陷阱、分支/PR 约定、所需的环境设置、测试怪癖。跳过自述文件中已有的内容或清单文件中显而易见的内容。不要将任何选项标记为“推荐”——这是关于他们团队的工作方式，而不是最佳实践。

blocks.original:
If the user chose personal CLAUDE.local.md or both: ask about them, not the codebase. Do not mark any options as "recommended" — this is about their personal preferences, not best practices. Examples of questions:
  - What's their role on the team? (e.g., "backend engineer", "data scientist", "new hire onboarding")
  - How familiar are they with this codebase and its languages/frameworks? (so Claude can calibrate explanation depth)
  - Do they have personal sandbox URLs, test accounts, API key paths, or local setup details Claude should know?
  - Only if Phase 2 found multiple git worktrees: ask whether their worktrees are nested inside the main repo (e.g., `.claude/worktrees/<name>/`) or siblings/external (e.g., `../myrepo-feature/`). If nested, the upward file walk finds the main repo's CLAUDE.local.md automatically — no special handling needed. If sibling/external, the personal content should live in a home-directory file (e.g., `~/.claude/<project-name>-instructions.md`) and each worktree gets a one-line CLAUDE.local.md stub that imports it: `@~/.claude/<project-name>-instructions.md`. Never put this import in the project CLAUDE.md — that would check a personal reference into t
blocks.zh:
如果用户选择个人 CLAUDE.local.md 或两者：询问它们，而不是代码库。不要将任何选项标记为“推荐”——这是关于他们的个人偏好，而不是最佳实践。问题示例：
  - 他们在团队中的角色是什么？ （例如“后端工程师”、“数据科学家”、“新员工入职”）
  - 他们对该代码库及其语言/框架的熟悉程度如何？ （这样克劳德就可以校准解释深度）
  - 他们是否有克劳德应该知道的个人沙箱 URL、测试帐户、API 密钥路径或本地设置详细信息？
  - 仅当第 2 阶段发现多个 git 工作树时：询问它们的工作树是否嵌套在主存储库（例如，`.claude/worktrees/<name>/`）或兄弟/外部（例如，`../myrepo-feature/`）内。如果嵌套，向上的文件遍历会自动找到主存储库的 CLAUDE.local.md — 无需特殊处理。如果是同级/外部，个人内容应位于主目录文件中（例如，`~/.claude/<project-name>-instructions.md`），并且每个工作树都会获得一个导入它的单行 CLAUDE.local.md 存根：`@~/.claude/<project-name>-instructions.md`。切勿将此导入放入项目 CLAUDE.md 中 — 这会将个人引用检查到 t

blocks.original:
he team-shared file.
  - Any communication preferences? (e.g., "be terse", "always explain tradeoffs", "don't summarize at the end")
blocks.zh:
他是团队共享的文件。
  - 有什么沟通偏好吗？ （例如，“简洁”、“始终解释权衡”、“不要在最后总结”）

blocks.original: If the user picked "Review and improve" in Phase 0: ask just one question — "Has anything changed about how the team works since this CLAUDE.md was written (new conventions, commands, gotchas)?" with options "No, nothing's changed" | "Yes — let me describe". If they pick Yes, ask what changed (free text) before continuing. Then skip to Phase 4.
blocks.zh: 如果用户在第 0 阶段选择“审查和改进”：只问一个问题 —“自从编写此 CLAUDE.md 以来，团队的工作方式是否发生了任何变化（新约定、命令、陷阱）？”带有选项“不，没有任何改变”| “是的——让我描述一下”。如果他们选择“是”，请在继续之前询问发生了什么变化（自由文本）。然后跳到第 4 阶段。

blocks.original: **Synthesize a proposal from Phase 2 findings and the gap-fill answers.** For each item, pick the artifact type that fits the evidence:
blocks.zh: **根据第 2 阶段的发现和填补空白的答案综合提出建议。** 对于每个项目，选择适合证据的工件类型：

blocks.original:
- **Hook** — deterministic, fast, per-edit shell command (formatting, linting a changed file).
  - **Skill** — on-demand multi-step workflow (`/verify`, `/deploy-staging`, session reports).
  - **CLAUDE.md note** — guidance that shapes behavior but isn't enforced (conventions, communication style).
blocks.zh:
- **Hook** — 确定性、快速、每次编辑的 shell 命令（格式化、检查已更改的文件）。
  - **技能** — 按需多步骤工作流程（`/verify`、`/deploy-staging`、会话报告）。
  - **CLAUDE.md note** — 塑造行为但不强制执行的指导（惯例、沟通方式）。

blocks.original: Include the CLAUDE.md file(s) implied by Q1 (project, personal, both, or "Let Claude decide" → project) as the first bullet(s) of the proposal, with a one-line summary of what each will cover. Then list skills/hooks/notes. On the "Leave it" path, omit CLAUDE.md file bullets and notes (Phase 4 won't run). On the "Start fresh" path with Q1 = personal-only, add a bullet noting the existing project CLAUDE.md will be left untouched (they chose not to replace it with a project file).
blocks.zh: 包括 Q1 隐含的 CLAUDE.md 文件（项目、个人、两者或“让 Claude 决定”→ 项目）作为提案的第一个项目符号，并用一行摘要说明每个项目将涵盖的内容。然后列出技能/挂钩/注释。在“Leave it”路径上，省略 CLAUDE.md 文件项目符号和注释（第 4 阶段不会运行）。在 Q1 = 仅限个人的“全新开始”路径上，添加一个项目符号，指出现有项目 CLAUDE.md 将保持不变（他们选择不将其替换为项目文件）。

blocks.original: Propose what fits. If the user gave a Q2 hint and your proposal deviates from it (e.g. they said "Hooks only" but nothing hook-shaped exists), say so in one line at the top of the proposal and propose the better-fitting artifacts anyway.
blocks.zh: 提出适合的建议。如果用户给出了 Q2 提示，而您的提案偏离了它（例如，他们说“仅钩子”，但不存在任何钩形），请在提案顶部的一行中如此说，并无论如何提出更合适的工件。

blocks.original: **Print the proposal as normal assistant text**, one bullet per item:
blocks.zh: **将提案打印为普通助理文本**，每项一个项目符号：

blocks.original:
> Here's what I'd set up:
> • **[Artifact type: file/hook/skill/note]** — [one-line description]
> • …
blocks.zh:
> 这是我的设置：
> • **[工件类型：文件/挂钩/技能/注释]** — [单行描述]
> • …

blocks.original: Then call AskUserQuestion with a simple question ("Does this look right?") and options like "Looks good — proceed" | "Drop the hook" | "Drop the skill". Don't use the `preview` field — the proposal is already visible in scrollback. The tool auto-adds an "Other" option for custom tweaks.
blocks.zh: 然后调用 AskUserQuestion，提出一个简单的问题（“这看起来正确吗？”）和“看起来不错 - 继续”等选项 | “放下钩子”| “放下技能”。不要使用“预览”字段 - 该提案已在回滚中可见。该工具会自动添加“其他”选项以进行自定义调整。

blocks.original: **Build the preference queue** from the accepted proposal. Each entry: {type: hook|skill|note, description, target file, any Phase-2-sourced details like the actual test/format command}. Phase 6 and Phase 7's hooks sub-bullet consume this queue; Phases 4/5 gate on the approved proposal's file bullets directly; Phase 7's GitHub-CLI and linting checks run regardless of queue contents.
blocks.zh: **根据已接受的提案构建偏好队列**。每个条目：{类型：钩子|技能|注释、描述、目标文件、任何来自第 2 阶段的详细信息，例如实际的测试/格式化命令}。第 6 阶段和第 7 阶段的 hooks 子项目符号消耗此队列；直接在已批准提案的文件项目符号上进行第 4/5 阶段；无论队列内容如何，​​第 7 阶段的 GitHub-CLI 和 linting 检查都会运行。

blocks.original: ## Phase 4: Write CLAUDE.md (if the approved proposal includes it, or on the "Review and improve" path)
blocks.zh: ## 第 4 阶段：编写 CLAUDE.md（如果批准的提案包含它，或者在“审查和改进”路径上）

blocks.original: Write a minimal CLAUDE.md at the project root. Every line must pass this test: "Would removing this cause Claude to make mistakes?" If no, cut it.
blocks.zh: 在项目根目录编写一个最小的 CLAUDE.md。每行都必须通过这个测试：“删除这个会导致克劳德犯错误吗？”如果没有，就剪掉。

blocks.original: If the user picked "Review and improve it" in Phase 0: don't write fresh — read the existing file, compare against Phase 2 findings and the Phase 3-lite answer, and propose specific additions/removals as diffs with a one-line reason for each. The existing file is the baseline; your job is to catch what's missing, outdated, or bloated. After printing the diffs, call AskUserQuestion ("Apply these edits?" with options like "Apply all" | "Let me pick which" | "Skip — leave it as is") before writing anything.
blocks.zh: 如果用户在第 0 阶段选择“审查并改进它”：不要写新内容 - 阅读现有文件，与第 2 阶段的发现和第 3 阶段精简版答案进行比较，并提出具体的添加/删除作为差异，并为每个添加/删除添加一行原因。现有文件为基线；你的工作是找出缺失的、过时的或臃肿的东西。打印差异后，在编写任何内容之前调用 AskUserQuestion（“应用这些编辑？”，其中包含“应用全部”|“让我选择哪个”|“跳过 - 保持原样”等选项）。

blocks.original: **Consume `note` entries from the Phase 3 preference queue whose target is CLAUDE.md** (team-level notes) — add each as a concise line in the most relevant section. These are the behaviors the user wants Claude to follow but didn't need guaranteed (e.g., "propose a plan before implementing", "explain the tradeoffs when refactoring"). Leave personal-targeted notes for Phase 5.
blocks.zh: **使用第 3 阶段首选项队列中的“note”条目，其目标是 CLAUDE.md**（团队级别注释） - 将每个条目作为简洁的行添加到最相关的部分中。这些是用户希望 Claude 遵循但不需要保证的行为（例如，“在实施之前提出计划”、“解释重构时的权衡”）。为第 5 阶段留下个人目标笔记。

blocks.original:
Include:
- Build/test/lint commands Claude can't guess (non-standard scripts, flags, or sequences)
- Code style rules that DIFFER from language defaults (e.g., "prefer type over interface")
- Testing instructions and quirks (e.g., "run single test with: pytest -k 'test_name'")
- Repo etiquette (branch naming, PR conventions, commit style)
- Required env vars or setup steps
- Non-obvious gotchas or architectural decisions
- Important parts from existing AI coding tool configs if they exist (AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules, .cursorrules, .github/copilot-instructions.md, .windsurfrules, .clinerules)
blocks.zh:
包括：
- 克劳德无法猜测的构建/测试/lint 命令（非标准脚本、标志或序列）
- 与语言默认值不同的代码样式规则（例如，“优先选择类型而不是接口”）
- 测试说明和怪癖（例如，“使用以下命令运行单个测试：pytest -k 'test_name'”）
- 回购礼仪（分支命名、PR 约定、提交风格）
- 所需的环境变量或设置步骤
- 不明显的问题或架构决策
- 现有 AI 编码工具配置的重要部分（如果存在）（AGENTS.md、.cursor/rules、.cursorrules、.github/copilot-instructions.md、.windsurfrules、.clinerules）

blocks.original:
Exclude:
- File-by-file structure or component lists (Claude can discover these by reading the codebase)
- Standard language conventions Claude already knows
- Generic advice ("write clean code", "handle errors")
- Detailed API docs or long references — use `@path/to/import` syntax instead (e.g., `@docs/api-reference.md`) to inline content on demand without bloating CLAUDE.md
- Information that changes frequently — reference the source with `@path/to/import` so Claude always reads the current version
- Long tutorials or walkthroughs (move to a separate file and reference with `@path/to/import`, or put in a skill)
- Commands obvious from manifest files (e.g., standard "npm test", "cargo test", "pytest")
blocks.zh:
排除：
- 逐个文件的结构或组件列表（克劳德可以通过阅读代码库发现这些）
- 克劳德已经知道的标准语言约定
- 通用建议（“编写干净的代码”，“处理错误”）
- 详细的 API 文档或长引用 - 使用 `@path/to/import` 语法（例如，`@docs/api-reference.md`）来按需内联内容，而不会使 CLAUDE.md 臃肿
- 经常更改的信息 - 使用“@path/to/import”引用源，以便 Claude 始终读取当前版本
- 长教程或演练（移至单独的文件并使用“@path/to/import”进行引用，或放入技能）
- 清单文件中显而易见的命令（例如，标准“npm test”、“cargo test”、“pytest”）

blocks.original: Be specific: "Use 2-space indentation in TypeScript" is better than "Format code properly."
blocks.zh: 具体来说：“在 TypeScript 中使用 2 个空格缩进”比“正确设置代码格式”更好。

blocks.original: Do not repeat yourself and do not make up sections like "Common Development Tasks" or "Tips for Development" — only include information expressly found in files you read.
blocks.zh: 不要重复自己，也不要编造诸如“常见开发任务”或“开发提示”之类的部分 - 仅包含在您阅读的文件中明确找到的信息。

blocks.original: Prefix the file with:
blocks.zh: 文件前缀为：

blocks.original:
```
# CLAUDE.md
blocks.zh:
````
# 克劳德.md

blocks.original:
This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
```
blocks.zh:
此文件为 Claude Code (claude.ai/code) 提供使用此存储库中的代码时的指导。
````

blocks.original: For projects with multiple concerns, suggest organizing instructions into `.claude/rules/` as separate focused files (e.g., `code-style.md`, `testing.md`, `security.md`). These are loaded automatically alongside CLAUDE.md and can be scoped to specific file paths using `paths` frontmatter.
blocks.zh: 对于具有多个问题的项目，建议将指令组织到“.claude/rules/”中作为单独的重点文件（例如“code-style.md”、“testing.md”、“security.md”）。它们会与 CLAUDE.md 一起自动加载，并且可以使用“paths” frontmatter 将范围限定到特定文件路径。

blocks.original: For projects with distinct subdirectories (monorepos, multi-module projects, etc.): mention that subdirectory CLAUDE.md files can be added for module-specific instructions (they're loaded automatically when Claude works in those directories). Offer to create them if the user wants.
blocks.zh: 对于具有不同子目录的项目（monorepos、多模块项目等）：提到可以添加子目录 CLAUDE.md 文件以用于特定于模块的指令（当 Claude 在这些目录中工作时，它们会自动加载）。如果用户愿意，可以主动创建它们。

blocks.original: ## Phase 5: Write CLAUDE.local.md (if the approved proposal includes it)
blocks.zh: ## 第5阶段：编写CLAUDE.local.md（如果批准的提案包含它）

blocks.original: Write a minimal CLAUDE.local.md at the project root. This file is automatically loaded alongside CLAUDE.md. After creating it, add `CLAUDE.local.md` to the project's .gitignore so it stays private.
blocks.zh: 在项目根目录写入一个最小的 CLAUDE.local.md。该文件会与 CLAUDE.md 一起自动加载。创建后，将“CLAUDE.local.md”添加到项目的 .gitignore 中，以使其保持私有状态。

blocks.original: **Consume `note` entries from the Phase 3 preference queue whose target is CLAUDE.local.md** (personal-level notes) — add each as a concise line. If the user chose personal-only in Phase 1, this is the sole consumer of note entries.
blocks.zh: **使用目标为 CLAUDE.local.md 的第 3 阶段首选项队列中的“note”条目（个人级别注释） - 将每个条目添加为简洁的行。如果用户在第一阶段选择仅限个人，则这是注释条目的唯一消费者。

blocks.original:
Include:
- The user's role and familiarity with the codebase (so Claude can calibrate explanations)
- Personal sandbox URLs, test accounts, or local setup details
- Personal workflow or communication preferences
blocks.zh:
包括：
- 用户的角色和对代码库的熟悉程度（以便 Claude 可以校准解释）
- 个人沙箱 URL、测试帐户或本地设置详细信息
- 个人工作流程或沟通偏好

blocks.original: Keep it short — only include what would make Claude's responses noticeably better for this user.
blocks.zh: 保持简短——只包含能让 Claude 的响应对该用户明显更好的内容。

blocks.original: If Phase 2 found multiple git worktrees and the user confirmed they use sibling/external worktrees (not nested inside the main repo): the upward file walk won't find a single CLAUDE.local.md from all worktrees. Write the actual personal content to `~/.claude/<project-name>-instructions.md` and make CLAUDE.local.md a one-line stub that imports it: `@~/.claude/<project-name>-instructions.md`. The user can copy this one-line stub to each sibling worktree. Never put this import in the project CLAUDE.md. If worktrees are nested inside the main repo (e.g., `.claude/worktrees/`), no special handling is needed — the main repo's CLAUDE.local.md is found automatically.
blocks.zh: 如果第 2 阶段发现多个 git 工作树并且用户确认他们使用同级/外部工作树（未嵌套在主存储库内）：向上文件遍历将不会从所有工作树中找到单个 CLAUDE.local.md。将实际的个人内容写入 `~/.claude/<project-name>-instructions.md` 并使 CLAUDE.local.md 成为导入它的单行存根：`@~/.claude/<project-name>-instructions.md`。用户可以将此单行存根复制到每个同级工作树。切勿将此导入放入项目 CLAUDE.md 中。如果工作树嵌套在主存储库中（例如`.claude/worktrees/`），则不需要特殊处理 - 主存储库的 CLAUDE.local.md 会自动找到。

blocks.original: If CLAUDE.local.md already exists: read it, propose specific additions, and do not silently overwrite.
blocks.zh: 如果 CLAUDE.local.md 已经存在：阅读它，提出具体的添加，并且不要默默地覆盖。

blocks.original: ## Phase 6: Suggest and create skills (if the approved proposal includes any)
blocks.zh: ## 第 6 阶段：建议和创造技能（如果批准的提案包含任何技能）

blocks.original: Skills add capabilities Claude can use on demand without bloating every session.
blocks.zh: 技能增加了克劳德可以按需使用的能力，而不会在每次会话中都显得臃肿。

blocks.original:
**First, consume `skill` entries from the Phase 3 preference queue.** Each queued skill preference becomes a SKILL.md tailored to what the user described. For each:
- Name it from the preference (e.g., "verify-deep", "session-report", "deploy-sandbox")
- Write the body using the user's own words from the interview plus whatever Phase 2 found (test commands, report format, deploy target). If the preference maps to an existing bundled skill (e.g., `/verify`), write a project skill that adds the user's specific constraints on top — tell the user the bundled one still exists and theirs is additive.
- Ask a quick follow-up if the preference is underspecified (e.g., "which test command should verify-deep run?")
blocks.zh:
**首先，使用第 3 阶段首选项队列中的“技能”条目。** 每个排队的技能首选项都会成为根据用户描述定制的 SKILL.md。对于每个：
- 根据首选项命名（例如“verify-deep”、“session-report”、“deploy-sandbox”）
- 使用用户在采访中自己的话以及第二阶段发现的任何内容（测试命令、报告格式、部署目标）来编写正文。如果偏好映射到现有的捆绑技能（例如“/verify”），请编写一项项目技能，在顶部添加用户的特定约束 - 告诉用户捆绑的技能仍然存在，并且他们的技能是附加的。
- 如果首选项未指定，请快速跟进（例如，“应验证深度运行哪个测试命令？”）

blocks.original:
**Then suggest additional skills** beyond the queue when you find:
- Reference knowledge for specific tasks (conventions, patterns, style guides for a subsystem)
- Repeatable workflows the user would want to trigger directly (deploy, fix an issue, release process, verify changes)
blocks.zh:
**然后，当您发现以下情况时，建议队列之外的其他技能**：
- 特定任务的参考知识（子系统的约定、模式、风格指南）
- 用户希望直接触发的可重复工作流程（部署、修复问题、发布流程、验证更改）

blocks.original: For each suggested skill, provide: name, one-line purpose, and why it fits this repo.
blocks.zh: 对于每项建议的技能，请提供：名称、一行目的以及为什么它适合此存储库。

blocks.original: If `.claude/skills/` already exists with skills, review them first. Do not overwrite existing skills — only propose new ones that complement what is already there.
blocks.zh: 如果 `.claude/skills/` 已存在技能，请先查看它们。不要覆盖现有技能——只提出新的技能来补充已有的技能。

blocks.original: Create each skill at `.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`:
blocks.zh: 在`.claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`中创建每个技能：

blocks.original:
```yaml
---
name: <skill-name>
description: <what the skill does and when to use it>
---
blocks.zh:
````yaml
---
名称：<技能名称>
描述：<该技能的作用以及何时使用>
---

blocks.original:
<Instructions for Claude>
```
blocks.zh:
<给克劳德的指示>
````

blocks.original: Both the user (`/<skill-name>`) and Claude can invoke skills by default. For workflows with side effects (e.g., `/deploy`, `/fix-issue 123`), add `disable-model-invocation: true` so only the user can trigger it, and use `$ARGUMENTS` to accept input.
blocks.zh: 默认情况下，用户（`/<skill-name>`）和 Claude 都可以调用技能。对于有副作用的工作流程（例如“/deploy”、“/fix-issue 123”），添加“disable-model-inspiration: true”，以便只有用户可以触发它，并使用“$ARGUMENTS”接受输入。

blocks.original: ## Phase 7: Suggest additional optimizations
blocks.zh: ## 第 7 阶段：提出额外优化建议

blocks.original: Tell the user you're going to suggest a few additional optimizations now that CLAUDE.md and skills (if chosen) are in place.
blocks.zh: 告诉用户，既然 CLAUDE.md 和技能（如果选择）已经到位，您将建议一些额外的优化。

blocks.original: Check the environment and ask about each gap you find (use AskUserQuestion):
blocks.zh: 检查环境并询问您发现的每个差距（使用 AskUserQuestion）：

blocks.original: - **GitHub CLI**: Run `which gh` (or `where gh` on Windows). If it's missing AND the project uses GitHub (check `git remote -v` for github.com), ask the user if they want to install it. Explain that the GitHub CLI lets Claude help with commits, pull requests, issues, and code review directly.
blocks.zh: - **GitHub CLI**：运行 `which gh` （或 Windows 上的 `where gh`）。如果它丢失并且项目使用 GitHub（检查 github.com 的“git remote -v”），请询问用户是否要安装它。说明 GitHub CLI 可让 Claude 直接帮助提交、拉取请求、问题和代码审查。

blocks.original: - **Linting**: If Phase 2 found no lint config (no .eslintrc, ruff.toml, .golangci.yml, etc. for the project's language), ask the user if they want Claude to set up linting for this codebase. Explain that linting catches issues early and gives Claude fast feedback on its own edits.
blocks.zh: - **Linting**：如果第 2 阶段没有发现 lint 配置（项目语言没有 .eslintrc、ruff.toml、.golangci.yml 等），请询问用户是否希望 Claude 为此代码库设置 lint。解释 linting 可以及早发现问题，并为 Claude 提供对其自己编辑的快速反馈。

blocks.original: - **Proposal-sourced hooks** (if the approved proposal includes any): Consume `hook` entries from the Phase 3 preference queue. If Phase 2 found a formatter and the queue has no formatting hook, offer format-on-edit as a fallback.
blocks.zh: - **提案来源的挂钩**（如果批准的提案包含任何挂钩）：使用第 3 阶段首选项队列中的“挂钩”条目。如果第 2 阶段找到格式化程序并且队列没有格式化挂钩，请提供编辑时格式化作为后备。

blocks.original: For each hook preference (from the queue or the formatter fallback):
blocks.zh: 对于每个钩子首选项（来自队列或格式化程序回退）：

blocks.original: 1. Target file: default based on the Phase 1 CLAUDE.md choice — project → `.claude/settings.json` (team-shared, committed); personal → `.claude/settings.local.json`. Only ask if the user chose "both" in Phase 1 or the preference is ambiguous. Ask once for all hooks, not per-hook.
blocks.zh: 1. 目标文件：默认基于第一阶段 CLAUDE.md 选择 — 项目 → `.claude/settings.json` （团队共享，已提交）；个人 → `.claude/settings.local.json`。仅询问用户是否在第一阶段选择了“两者”或者偏好不明确。对所有钩子询问一次，而不是针对每个钩子。

blocks.original:
2. Pick the event and matcher from the preference:
     - "after every edit" → `PostToolUse` with matcher `Write|Edit`
     - "when Claude finishes" / "before I review" → `Stop` event (fires at the end of every turn — including read-only ones)
     - "before running bash" → `PreToolUse` with matcher `Bash`
     - "before committing" (literal git-commit gate) → **not a hooks.json hook.** Matchers can't filter Bash by command content, so there's no way to target only `git commit`. Route this to a git pre-commit hook (`.git/hooks/pre-commit`, husky, pre-commit framework) instead — offer to write one. If the user actually means "before I review and commit Claude's output", that's `Stop` — probe to disambiguate.
     Probe if the preference is ambiguous.
blocks.zh:
2. 从首选项中选择事件和匹配器：
     - “每次编辑后” → `PostToolUse` 和匹配器 `Write|Edit`
     -“当克劳德完成时”/“在我回顾之前”→“停止”事件（在每个回合结束时触发 - 包括只读回合）
     - “运行 bash 之前” → `PreToolUse` 和匹配器 `Bash`
     - “提交之前”（字面的 git-commit 门）→ **不是 hooks.json 钩子。** 匹配器无法通过命令内容过滤 Bash，因此无法仅针对“git commit”。将其路由到 git 预提交钩子（`.git/hooks/pre-commit`，husky，预提交框架）——提议编写一个。如果用户实际上的意思是“在我审查并提交 Claude 的输出之前”，那就是“停止”——探测以消除歧义。
     探究偏好是否不明确。

blocks.original: 3. **Load the hook reference** (once per `/init` run, before the first hook): invoke the Skill tool with `skill: 'update-config'` and args starting with `[hooks-only]` followed by a one-line summary of what you're building — e.g., `[hooks-only] Constructing a PostToolUse/Write|Edit format hook for .claude/settings.json using ruff`. This loads the hooks schema and verification flow into context. Subsequent hooks reuse it — don't re-invoke.
blocks.zh: 3. **加载钩子引用**（每次 `/init` 运​​行一次，在第一个钩子之前）：使用 `skill: 'update-config'` 和以 `[hooks-only]` 开头的参数调用 Skill 工具，后跟您正在构建的内容的单行摘要 — 例如，`[hooks-only] Constructing a PostToolUse/Write|Edit format hook for .claude/settings.json using ruff`。这会将钩子架构和验证流程加载到上下文中。后续的钩子会重用它——不要重新调用。

blocks.original: 4. Follow the skill's **"Constructing a Hook"** flow: dedup check → construct for THIS project → pipe-test raw → wrap → write JSON → `jq -e` validate → live-proof (for `Pre|PostToolUse` on triggerable matchers) → cleanup → handoff. Target file and event/matcher come from steps 1–2 above.
blocks.zh: 4. 遵循技能的 **“构建 Hook”** 流程：重复数据删除检查 → 构建此项目 → 管道测试原始 → 包装 → 写入 JSON → `jq -e` 验证 → 实时验证（对于可触发匹配器上的 `Pre|PostToolUse`）→ 清理 → 移交。目标文件和事件/匹配器来自上面的步骤 1-2。

blocks.original: Act on each "yes" before moving on.
blocks.zh: 在继续之前，先对每个“是”采取行动。

blocks.original: ## Phase 8: Summary and next steps
blocks.zh: ## 第 8 阶段：总结和后续步骤

blocks.original: Recap what was set up — which files were written and the key points included in each. Remind the user these files are a starting point: they should review and tweak them, and can run `/init` again anytime to re-scan.
blocks.zh: 回顾一下设置的内容——编写了哪些文件以及每个文件中包含的要点。提醒用户这些文件是一个起点：他们应该检查和调整它们，并且可以随时再次运行“/init”来重新扫描。

blocks.original: Then tell the user that you'll be introducing a few more suggestions for optimizing their codebase and Claude Code setup based on what you found. Present these as a single, well-formatted to-do list where every item is relevant to this repo. Put the most impactful items first.
blocks.zh: 然后告诉用户，您将根据您的发现引入更多建议，以优化他们的代码库和 Claude 代码设置。将它们呈现为单个、格式良好的待办事项列表，其中每个项目都与此存储库相关。将最有影响力的项目放在第一位。

blocks.original:
When building the list, work through these checks and include only what applies:
- If frontend code was detected (React, Vue, Svelte, etc.): `/plugin install frontend-design@claude-plugins-official` gives Claude design principles and component patterns so it produces polished UI; `/plugin install playwright@claude-plugins-official` lets Claude launch a real browser, screenshot what it built, and fix visual bugs itself.
- If you found gaps in Phase 7 (missing GitHub CLI, missing linting) and the user said no: list them here with a one-line reason why each helps.
- If tests are missing or sparse: suggest setting up a test framework so Claude can verify its own changes.
- To help you create skills and optimize existing skills using evals, Claude Code has an official skill-creator plugin you can install. Install it with `/plugin install skill-creator@claude-plugins-official`, then run `/skill-creator <skill-name>` to create new skills or refine any existing skill. (Always include this one.)
- Browse official plugins with `/plugin` — these bundle skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers that you may find helpful. You can also create your own custom plugins to share them with others. (Alwa
blocks.zh:
构建列表时，请完成这些检查并仅包含适用的内容：
- 如果检测到前端代码（React、Vue、Svelte 等）：`/plugin install frontend-design@claude-plugins-official` 给出 Claude 设计原则和组件模式，以便生成精美的 UI； `/plugin install playwright@claude-plugins-official` 让克劳德启动一个真正的浏览器，截图它构建的内容，并修复视觉错误本身。
- 如果您在第 7 阶段发现了差距（缺少 GitHub CLI、缺少 linting）并且用户拒绝：将它们列在此处，并附上一行理由解释为什么每项都有帮助。
- 如果测试缺失或稀疏：建议设置一个测试框架，以便 Claude 可以验证自己的更改。
- 为了帮助您使用评估创建技能并优化现有技能，Claude Code 有一个您可以安装的官方技能创建器插件。使用“/plugin install Skill-creator@claude-plugins-official”安装它，然后运行“/skill-creator <skill-name>”来创建新技能或完善任何现有技能。 （始终包括这一点。）
- 使用“/plugin”浏览官方插件 - 这些捆绑技能、代理、挂钩和 MCP 服务器可能对您有用。您还可以创建自己的自定义插件以与其他人共享。 （阿尔瓦

blocks.original: ys include this one.)
blocks.zh: 是的，包括这个。）
